17e7052e6c36560428f0ce8d6b508fcd6948e1a1.rule_statement: Proposals for scheme continuation beyond 31.03.2021 must be submitted by 31.12.2020
Ongoing schemes extended until 31.03.2021 or until Finance Commission recommendations take effect

988ce7efcc7ac8c9c2d61b5a7485c01a3154c47d.rule_statement: Continuation of schemes with financial implications within delegated powers requires appraisal and approval per guidelines
Ongoing schemes with sunset dates before 2025-26 are exempt from the 5-year appraisal/approval rule
Complete appraisal/approval before 31-03-2021, considering third-party evaluations
988ce7efcc7ac8c9c2d61b5a7485c01a3154c47d.ministry_must_show: Evidence of appraisal completion and evaluations

0e656e52c71c81656727034df6c6f2784c1db9ed.rule_statement: Proposals for schemes over Rs. 500 crore require EFC appraisal and approval
0e656e52c71c81656727034df6c6f2784c1db9ed.ministry_must_show: Submit detailed proposal for EFC review

0e656e52c71c81656727034df6c6f2784c1db9ed.rule_statement: List of schemes with financial implications between Rs. 300-500 crore must be provided to DoE
Umbrella schemes should ensure resource convergence across related schemes
Standalone schemes' financial outlay determines appraisal authority as per DoE OM 24(35)/PF-II/2012
Overall financial implications of umbrella schemes must be considered for appraisal authority
No standalone CSS or umbrella scheme should have financial outlay below Rs. 300 crore over five years
Umbrella schemes must have individual schemes with outlay not less than Rs. 25 crore, standalone CS schemes not less than Rs. 50 crore
Schemes with outlay less than Rs. 25 crore should be classified as projects or pilots
Adhere to existing orders on scheme structure and funding patterns
Proposals must reflect convergence with similar schemes to avoid overlap
Avoid unnecessary administrative expenses and establish single monitoring bodies
Common norms should be evolved and followed across similar schemes
Review and indicate staff requirements in proposals with financial implications
Proposals must include Aadhaar authentication for beneficiary identification and fund disbursement
Incorporate cashless and electronic transactions in scheme design

9bb162d12e6cda3405f9255543395705b34960b1.rule_statement: Specify the name of the Umbrella scheme for continuation
9bb162d12e6cda3405f9255543395705b34960b1.ministry_must_show: Name of the relevant Umbrella scheme

9bb162d12e6cda3405f9255543395705b34960b1.rule_statement: Provide total outlay of the umbrella scheme, including scheme-wise and year-wise breakdown
9bb162d12e6cda3405f9255543395705b34960b1.ministry_must_show: Outlay details with Central and State shares

8e82493196f94cecf8ba5724c453626955ef9248.rule_statement: Identify central components fully funded by the central government and state components shared with states/UTs
8e82493196f94cecf8ba5724c453626955ef9248.ministry_must_show: Detailed breakdown of funding sources for components

c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.rule_statement: Submit evaluation report with major findings and comments on observations
Propose major changes from earlier scheme with justification
Report any major changes in costing norms
c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.ministry_must_show: Details of any changes in costing norms

c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.rule_statement: Outline convergence architecture with other central schemes
Propose year-wise output/outcomes for the scheme
Specify the sunset date for the scheme
Detail posts created for the scheme and financial implications
c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.ministry_must_show: List of posts and financial implications

c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.rule_statement: Propose any additional posts with financial implications
Include comments from stakeholders and responses in tabular form
c5f41c6f3158673330a603d409eb7951552fe522.ministry_must_show: Tabular format of comments and responses

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Ministry/Department must provide comments on Third-Party Evaluation findings and attach the evaluation copy
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Comments on evaluation findings and evaluation report

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Details of components being dropped, merged, modified, or newly added must be provided with justifications
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Comprehensive list of component changes and justifications

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Year-wise outlay for the proposed scheme must be detailed for specified years
Actual Expenditure of the existing scheme for the last 4 years must be reported along with eligible outlay calculation
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Expenditure data and eligible outlay calculation

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Proposed outlay must be within eligible outlay; if not, reasons for excess must be provided
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of outlay compliance or justification for excess

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Fund sharing ratio between Centre and States for Centrally Sponsored Schemes must be detailed
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Fund sharing ratio table and justifications for variations

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Any changes in cost norms compared to the existing scheme must be justified
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Details of cost norm changes and justifications

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Every Central Scheme must have a sunset clause with proposed interventions to fulfill it
Details of posts created for the existing scheme and any proposed additional posts must be provided
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: List of posts and financial implications

232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.rule_statement: Diagrammatic representations of scheme implementation structure and fund flow must be provided
232ff3541bc6f4407b67178009014049997daee7.ministry_must_show: Diagrams of implementation structure and fund flow

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Ministry/Department must provide comments on Third-Party Evaluation findings and attach the evaluation copy
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Comments on evaluation findings and evaluation report

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Details of components being dropped, merged, modified, or newly added must be provided with justification
Year-wise outlay for the proposed scheme must be detailed for 2026-31
Actual expenditure for the last 4 years must be reported along with eligible outlay calculation
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Expenditure data and eligible outlay calculation

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Proposed outlay must be within eligible outlay; if not, reasons for excess must be provided
Fund sharing ratio between Centre and States for CSS must be uniform unless justified otherwise
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Details and justification for differing ratios

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Any changes in cost norms compared to the existing scheme must be justified
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Details of cost norm changes and justifications

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Every Central Scheme must have a sunset clause with proposed interventions described
Details of posts created for the existing scheme and any proposed additional posts must be provided
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Details of posts and financial implications

50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.rule_statement: Diagrammatic representations of scheme implementation structure and fund flow must be provided
50941b5e50d238406caf474d3584870d699b74fb.ministry_must_show: Diagrams of implementation and fund flow

6a0ffa26e113bddf1a7d30573b4f02c4f7ca58a5.rule_statement: No new Scheme or Sub-Scheme can start without prior in-principle approval from DoE, except Budget Speech announcements.

e0c9c8ec979562b0ef6b4244e3728626272c1bc7.rule_statement: Budget Estimates must align with approved scheme architecture; deviations require prior agreement with DoE
e0c9c8ec979562b0ef6b4244e3728626272c1bc7.ministry_must_show: Agreement from DoE for any deviations

c615738dc7458bed8c2cf7b472fd4d89745e950e.rule_statement: Administrative Ministries must merge, restructure, or drop redundant schemes without needing in-principle approval

eb2ff6535f8b236d69f94c19624dc077053abbb1.rule_statement: DoE can merge, restructure, or drop schemes to improve efficiency after consulting the Administrative Department
Prepare a Concept Paper for new schemes while seeking in-principle approval and stakeholder consultations
Ongoing schemes must be rationalized by merging or dropping redundant schemes
Project preparation must start with a Feasibility Report to confirm techno-economic soundness
No new body should be set up without Cabinet approval, regardless of outlay
Delegation of powers for appraisal and approval of Original Cost Estimates varies by cost thresholds

ca660a91c14ad4ebf3ffa92b80589903154461f6.rule_statement: Financial Advisers can refer financial matters to DoE; mandatory for proposals above Rs. 300 crore
ca660a91c14ad4ebf3ffa92b80589903154461f6.ministry_must_show: Inclusion of DoE in SFC/DIB meetings for large proposals

6d00d8d87f206c76e7deca016be3a70f223cb2e0.rule_statement: Delegated powers can only be used if budget allocation or medium-term outlay is approved by DoE
6d00d8d87f206c76e7deca016be3a70f223cb2e0.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of budgetary allocation from DoE

6324874bbfbe8e590bb7197e5b904d010cb047bc.rule_statement: Ministries/Departments must rigorously examine proposals in project design and delivery
6324874bbfbe8e590bb7197e5b904d010cb047bc.ministry_must_show: Evidence of thorough project review process

6324874bbfbe8e590bb7197e5b904d010cb047bc.rule_statement: Attention to recurring liabilities and fund availability post adjustment of committed liabilities is essential
6324874bbfbe8e590bb7197e5b904d010cb047bc.ministry_must_show: Assessment of recurring liabilities and fund status

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Separate orders from Department of Economic Affairs apply for PPP project appraisal and approval
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Compliance with DoEA orders for PPP projects

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Cost increases up to 20% due to various reasons approved by Secretary with Financial Adviser's concurrence
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Secretary's approval and Financial Adviser's concurrence

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Increases beyond 20% must be reviewed by a Revised Cost Committee before further approval
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Submission to Revised Cost Committee for review

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Pre-investment activities up to Rs. 100 crore can be approved by Secretary with Financial Adviser's concurrence
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Financial resources availability and in-principle approval

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Pre-investment activities above Rs. 100 crore require full appraisal and approval procedure
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Follow prescribed appraisal and approval process

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: All schemes must have a sunset date and undergo outcome review at the end of the Twelfth Plan period
Output-outcome framework must be prepared for each scheme with NITI Aayog's approval
b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.ministry_must_show: Output-outcome framework approved by NITI Aayog

b9dabe3170ca202d784ea84683e5849b369705e7.rule_statement: Extension of schemes to next Finance Commission Cycle contingent on third-party evaluation results

b2c194380808ca1268ed81937908221c5b7f8a57.rule_statement: Define measurable outcomes for each scheme for the medium term until 2019-20

328aece07f06b4d9ef90ea75ba9b649e7c506dfa.rule_statement: Budget allocation for 2016-17 should project a normative increase of 5-10% annually until 2019-20

b87566027014ccf391884f56cf72de998c6d6e8b.rule_statement: Yearly physical outputs must align with projected financial resources and measurable outcomes
b87566027014ccf391884f56cf72de998c6d6e8b.ministry_must_show: Demonstrate consistency with financial and outcome metrics

afeec75c92cce793b327fdc1dae79b0d7d05037c.rule_statement: Output-outcome framework must be approved by CEO, NITI Aayog by 30 June 2016
afeec75c92cce793b327fdc1dae79b0d7d05037c.ministry_must_show: Submission of approved framework by deadline

7400e7393b87db40d731740da44f8b11f917888b.rule_statement: Each scheme must have an evaluation framework; continuation beyond the Fourteenth Finance Commission depends on evaluation results
7400e7393b87db40d731740da44f8b11f917888b.ministry_must_show: Submit evaluation framework and results to NITI Aayog

7400e7393b87db40d731740da44f8b11f917888b.rule_statement: Identify outcome parameters as indicators of desired outcomes; prioritize for upcoming budgets
7400e7393b87db40d731740da44f8b11f917888b.ministry_must_show: List of identified outcome parameters for budget planning

e44438d185842522a327a50a2834f0f32b4bae24.rule_statement: Beneficiary-oriented schemes must specify if they are DBT schemes and detail beneficiary identification via Aadhaar authentication
e44438d185842522a327a50a2834f0f32b4bae24.ministry_must_show: Mechanism for Aadhaar authentication and fund disbursement

e44438d185842522a327a50a2834f0f32b4bae24.rule_statement: Funds must be disbursed through APBS using the DBT scheme code
e44438d185842522a327a50a2834f0f32b4bae24.ministry_must_show: DBT scheme code for fund disbursement

1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.rule_statement: EFC/SFC proposals for new schemes must use the revised format and include required enclosures
1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.ministry_must_show: Complete proposals in Annexure-A format with checklist

1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.rule_statement: Obtain in-principle approval from DoE before initiating any new scheme or sub-scheme
1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.ministry_must_show: Reference to DoE's prior approvals as per specified OMs

1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.rule_statement: Consult NITi Aayog for new schemes as part of the approval process
1e157b27f459c5f93f3f5f13ac67b81407c1700d.ministry_must_show: Evidence of consultation with NITi Aayog

14a6d0227de1344a7d5f056159c9faa398c6d962.rule_statement: All EFC/SFC proposals or new schemes must be submitted after 15.11.2023
EFC/SFC memorandum must include a summary sheet with specified details
14a6d0227de1344a7d5f056159c9faa398c6d962.ministry_must_show: Complete summary sheet as per format

14a6d0227de1344a7d5f056159c9faa398c6d962.rule_statement: Attach necessary documents like concept paper and evaluation report as per the format
Mandatory approvals and clearances must be indicated in a tabular form
Administrative structure and manpower requirements must be detailed for scheme implementation
Monitoring systems must be established and detailed for the scheme
Third-party evaluations must be arranged and budgeted for

cd3e45fbefb30ba07a44770e8aec93879a9221a8.rule_statement: No new scheme or sub-scheme initiated without prior in-principle approval from DoE, except Budget Speech announcements
Ministries must adhere to approval process or face budgetary support reduction
cd3e45fbefb30ba07a44770e8aec93879a9221a8.ministry_must_show: Evidence of compliance with approval process

cd3e45fbefb30ba07a44770e8aec93879a9221a8.rule_statement: Submit list of approved schemes/projects with proposals for in-principle approval
cd3e45fbefb30ba07a44770e8aec93879a9221a8.ministry_must_show: List of schemes/projects approved in last three years

0458275c0d745b0b19d4086701f1f311e1663442.rule_statement: Every scheme must have a sunset date for continuation based on outcome review
Schemes must align with the financial resource cycles of Central and State governments
0458275c0d745b0b19d4086701f1f311e1663442.ministry_must_show: Evidence of alignment with Finance Commission cycles

7eebd15617109b1acedff965b6fe76fe51b7fc7b.rule_statement: Schemes ending on 31.03.2026 must undergo appraisal for continuation in the next FC cycle
7eebd15617109b1acedff965b6fe76fe51b7fc7b.ministry_must_show: Outcome review results and appraisal memos

7eebd15617109b1acedff965b6fe76fe51b7fc7b.rule_statement: Central Sector Schemes require Third Party Evaluation as per issued ToRs
Appraisal memos must be submitted to DoE by 31.10.2025

18b000f268ec277e7189a42e5904c51fac1fb76e.rule_statement: Schemes with outlay up to Rs 500 Crore can be approved by Administrative Ministry as per DoE guidelines
Appraisal/approval must consider third-party evaluation reports
18b000f268ec277e7189a42e5904c51fac1fb76e.ministry_must_show: Cognizance of evaluation reports in appraisal

18b000f268ec277e7189a42e5904c51fac1fb76e.rule_statement: Submit a list of all approved schemes to DoE in prescribed format

a6ed421d3766eac973f85922b3531c8177f7ce00.rule_statement: Schemes with outlay above Rs 500 Crore require appraisal and approval through EFC
a6ed421d3766eac973f85922b3531c8177f7ce00.ministry_must_show: Submit appraisal documents as per DoE OM No. 24(35)/PF-II/2012

cf26c524247fd9f3f9f7d632a664623f88c81ebd.rule_statement: No CSS should have a financial outlay below Rs. 300 crore for five years

67d844ccb998ddc9bf23d3710ca3a2ddf9ee3e66.rule_statement: Financial outlay for CSs must be at least Rs. 50 crore over five years

c947b49d7ab18bc6153e294e65d591b2afff69b1.rule_statement: Central Sector Schemes under Rs 100 Crore should achieve purpose in a cycle, else need evaluation for continuation
If continued, schemes must undergo appraisal/approval as per DoE OM 24(35)/PF-II/2012
c947b49d7ab18bc6153e294e65d591b2afff69b1.ministry_must_show: Submit for appraisal as per specified guidelines

65fc40d78330e982cc7b8cac24745a76e805892a.rule_statement: Total projected outlay for a continuing scheme should not exceed 5.5 times the average annual expenditure
65fc40d78330e982cc7b8cac24745a76e805892a.ministry_must_show: Calculation of average annual expenditure for specified FYs

4b7fbc234d89793ec157ee874dee113c1d971b8b.rule_statement: Ministries can request more funds for a scheme if they reduce another scheme's budget with justification

d01a11c61bd5f32e86e8fbbe0501e16d4064eb9e.rule_statement: All schemes must operate within the approved outlay limits over the FC cycle
d01a11c61bd5f32e86e8fbbe0501e16d4064eb9e.ministry_must_show: Compliance with total sanctions against approved outlay

8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.rule_statement: Outlay for saturation schemes based on estimated number of beneficiaries; sanctions limited to approved outlay
8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.ministry_must_show: Estimated beneficiary numbers in EFC Memo

8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.rule_statement: Carry forward committed expenditure within approved outlay to next FC cycle allowed
8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.ministry_must_show: Details of spillover expenditure in EFC Memo

8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.rule_statement: Seek specific approval for increased outlay if beneficiaries exceed projections during scheme duration
8b10097bcb581ed4bfded1439cbb4e63f345ddc0.ministry_must_show: Request for increased outlay with DoE concurrence

4600b2189883133168852124577a6bda983ffab1.rule_statement: Funding pattern for CSS must align with NITI Aayog's specified OMs from 2016 and 2019
4600b2189883133168852124577a6bda983ffab1.ministry_must_show: Compliance with NITI Aayog's funding directives

fc6dc0702ca14499b62e00a2360ed7a3b67b885d.rule_statement: Ministries must respond quickly to draft Evaluation Report from NITI Aayog
Ministries must consider Evaluation Report recommendations when formulating schemes

751bfa99796ffaed4d143f49ed8acbbe54eb5342.rule_statement: Continuation approval requires a positive evaluation report demonstrating effectiveness and need for continuation
751bfa99796ffaed4d143f49ed8acbbe54eb5342.ministry_must_show: Submit evaluation report with positive outcomes and justification for continuation

87e461f8f4f2eae543a49d7138fc89132ab1aa1c.rule_statement: A scheme may continue as is or with modifications based on evaluation findings
87e461f8f4f2eae543a49d7138fc89132ab1aa1c.ministry_must_show: Evaluation report and proposed modifications if any

64e903b6a33cca3fbc9d56d52b3c246f940e2965.rule_statement: Consider XVIth FC recommendations when appraising scheme continuation and financial outlay
64e903b6a33cca3fbc9d56d52b3c246f940e2965.ministry_must_show: Evidence of FC recommendations in appraisal

d348a1dacdb931cf0169f5772ecd43fb79158187.rule_statement: Ministries must engage with States for prioritizing National goals in continuing schemes
d348a1dacdb931cf0169f5772ecd43fb79158187.ministry_must_show: Evidence of engagement and alignment with National goals

7f4e9c2326bcd774a9d00b8e49d4b727c142859a.rule_statement: Ministries/Departments must circulate Appraisal Memos to all stakeholders and include their comments
7f4e9c2326bcd774a9d00b8e49d4b727c142859a.ministry_must_show: Final Appraisal Memo with incorporated comments

b2ddbe675fd70001ea62fc05236b6dfd31b71d30.rule_statement: Timelines for finalizing Cabinet notes must be adhered to for the appraisal process
b2ddbe675fd70001ea62fc05236b6dfd31b71d30.ministry_must_show: Compliance with specified timelines in appraisal

d0cba562de81d902df20cfc7d1d26ff75467570a.rule_statement: Ministries/Departments must submit Appraisal Memo with evaluation reports by 31st October 2025

b53c1b49dc489a051c4020b58027e8d82e9c7650.rule_statement: Fresh appraisal and approval required for schemes beyond 31.03.2026
b53c1b49dc489a051c4020b58027e8d82e9c7650.ministry_must_show: Submit composite appraisal for all schemes

b53c1b49dc489a051c4020b58027e8d82e9c7650.rule_statement: Schemes must maintain consistent funding patterns across components unless justified otherwise
Follow common norms like Skilling and UGC norms for costing
Proposals must modify implementation for Aadhaar seeding and direct benefits transfer
b53c1b49dc489a051c4020b58027e8d82e9c7650.ministry_must_show: Plan for Aadhaar authentication in proposals

b53c1b49dc489a051c4020b58027e8d82e9c7650.rule_statement: Funds must be disbursed through AEPS for Aadhaar authentication
Incorporate cashless and electronic transactions in scheme design

ace16ff216b81f5c49188b05a17e70d4b19cc63f.rule_statement: Schemes should allow resource transfer across components for effectiveness, but with a spending ceiling
ace16ff216b81f5c49188b05a17e70d4b19cc63f.ministry_must_show: Ceiling details and justification in Appraisal Memo

3f4f3adf615be70db95419359dedeb648ec1a629.rule_statement: Ministries and Departments should utilize the 25% flexi-fund allowance for CSSs as per NITI Aayog's guidelines
3f4f3adf615be70db95419359dedeb648ec1a629.ministry_must_show: Evidence of flexi-fund usage in CSSs

f2e9d19b6b4d4d672417c6526e308b4a537d0ce3.rule_statement: Recalibrate scheme design and architecture based on evaluations and implementation experience
Restructure schemes to eliminate redundancies and ineffective interventions
Close schemes that are no longer useful or have met their objectives

8d782773ab5c4d9e11eb5fd57b4f9a070bcc6c1e.rule_statement: Proposals must show clear convergence with similar schemes to avoid overlap of activities for target beneficiaries

b80c5abefd8506d257a6e149765e11db83e1d911.rule_statement: Ministries must assess ongoing schemes for potential mergers or drops due to overlapping objectives
b80c5abefd8506d257a6e149765e11db83e1d911.ministry_must_show: Report on scheme overlaps and recommendations

ced7640dc8385be7d396062dc2d1c2d342ac75dc.rule_statement: Ministries must rationalize existing schemes before proposing continuation of any scheme

1342b54fe241b39e484216b134c410a83826f2ae.rule_statement: Avoid unnecessary creation of establishments and administrative expenses; minimize resource spread
1342b54fe241b39e484216b134c410a83826f2ae.ministry_must_show: Justification for establishment and resource allocation

1342b54fe241b39e484216b134c410a83826f2ae.rule_statement: Establish a single monitoring body like a PMU at Central or state level
1342b54fe241b39e484216b134c410a83826f2ae.ministry_must_show: Details of the proposed PMU structure and function

8953452db2ce2c2120354a064680c97e2a158606.rule_statement: Implementation of CSSs and CSs should not create permanent posts
8953452db2ce2c2120354a064680c97e2a158606.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of no permanent post creation

cf21f1c47d0eabf909edfc5763a5594a12f2d3e5.rule_statement: Appraisal of schemes must follow a separately informed schedule
cf21f1c47d0eabf909edfc5763a5594a12f2d3e5.ministry_must_show: Compliance with the provided appraisal timeline

cf21f1c47d0eabf909edfc5763a5594a12f2d3e5.rule_statement: Expenditures for schemes expiring on 31.03.2026 require completed appraisal and approval by that date
cf21f1c47d0eabf909edfc5763a5594a12f2d3e5.ministry_must_show: Proof of completed appraisal and approval before expenditure

c1cbf4e20a1a1c464593d169d92eeca6421b8efa.rule_statement: Sponsoring Ministry must send hard copy of the note to stakeholder Ministries on the same day as the memo date
c1cbf4e20a1a1c464593d169d92eeca6421b8efa.ministry_must_show: Proof of same-day delivery of hard copy

c1cbf4e20a1a1c464593d169d92eeca6421b8efa.rule_statement: Sponsoring Ministry may convene meetings or video conferences for clarity on proposals
Sponsoring Ministry must vigorously pursue critical comments from consulted Ministries

98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.rule_statement: Regular review of pendency in Senior Officers' Meetings for Cabinet/Cabinet Committee Notes is mandatory
98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.ministry_must_show: Evidence of meetings and follow-ups on pending notes

98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.rule_statement: Sponsoring and consulted Ministries must adhere to revised timelines for finalizing Cabinet/CCEA notes
98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.ministry_must_show: Compliance with specified timelines for each activity

98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.rule_statement: Ministries must upload bare details of Cabinet/CCEA notes on the designated portal
98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of uploaded details on the portal

98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.rule_statement: Sensitive subjects may be modified or redacted when uploading information on the portal
Comments from consulted Ministries on Detailed Papers must be submitted within specified timelines
98dd9c9920b68b979500655cd9743fdfda561db9.ministry_must_show: Submission records of comments within deadlines

28bf7bec516cc2fcf034a52c47fd2ce3de04bdc9.rule_statement: For schemes needing Cabinet approval, the Secretary (Expenditure) chairs the Expenditure Finance Committee/Public Investment Board

b5e9dd37f580821e64fa2e7d3301556f00c9101c.rule_statement: Ongoing schemes of scientific Ministries/Departments must continue post Finance Commission cycle
b5e9dd37f580821e64fa2e7d3301556f00c9101c.ministry_must_show: Evidence of ongoing scheme relevance and funding

8a129a6683646bda9e52139ee7bf1bf15d6d6ab7.rule_statement: Procedure in paragraph 2 applies to all schemes/projects cleared by the Digital Communications Commission needing Cabinet approval

18c581b8dd2b189297a9259e0dd7a32a98b79596.rule_statement: Achievements of Outcome Budget 2025-26 will be reviewed in FY 2026-27 and adjusted annually
18c581b8dd2b189297a9259e0dd7a32a98b79596.ministry_must_show: Report on achievements and proposed changes

52f2de5c63110f1a0a24f3313ebbd8afca899fa7.rule_statement: Financial outlay for CSs must be at least Rs. 50 crore for five years
CS schemes under Rs. 100 crore must show purpose achievement in FC cycle; exceptions need evaluation report
Continuing exceptional CS schemes must undergo appraisal/approval as per DoE OM No.24(35)/PF-II/2012
52f2de5c63110f1a0a24f3313ebbd8afca899fa7.ministry_must_show: Submit for appraisal/approval as per guidelines

8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.rule_statement: Total sanctions over the FC cycle must not exceed the approved outlay for FUND LIMITED schemes
Outlay for saturation schemes based on estimated beneficiaries, with carry forward flexibility within approved outlay
Seek specific approval from competent authority for increased outlay if beneficiary numbers rise beyond projections
8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.ministry_must_show: Request with DoE concurrence for increased outlay

8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.rule_statement: Funding pattern for CSS must align with NITI Aayog's specified guidelines
8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.ministry_must_show: Compliance with NITI Aayog's OM references

8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.rule_statement: Respond quickly to draft evaluation reports from NITI Aayog to finalize recommendations
Continuation approval requires positive evaluation outcomes and justification for ongoing need
Schemes may continue as is or with modifications based on evaluation findings
Consider XVIth FC recommendations when appraising schemes for continuation and financial outlay
8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.ministry_must_show: Documentation of FC recommendations in appraisal

8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.rule_statement: Engage with States to prioritize national goals and ensure synergy in expenditure for continuing schemes
8a3ccaaaf2fd7e228fe672cfea145cc32f9b4462.ministry_must_show: Evidence of engagement with State authorities

b0fa7446571ba61bfff1fb7ae50ca633dab31bb0.rule_statement: Fresh appraisal and approval required for schemes beyond 31.03.2026
b0fa7446571ba61bfff1fb7ae50ca633dab31bb0.ministry_must_show: Composite appraisal report for all schemes

b0fa7446571ba61bfff1fb7ae50ca633dab31bb0.rule_statement: Schemes must maintain consistency in funding patterns across components unless justified
Proposals must include Aadhaar authentication for direct benefits and use AEPS for disbursement
Inter-component resource transfer allowed but must have a ceiling to prevent overspending
b0fa7446571ba61bfff1fb7ae50ca633dab31bb0.ministry_must_show: Approval and justification in Appraisal Memo

b0fa7446571ba61bfff1fb7ae50ca633dab31bb0.rule_statement: Use 25% flexi-fund allowance for CSSs as per NITI Aayog guidelines
Rationalization of schemes through redesign, restructuring, or closure based on evaluations
Proposals must show convergence with similar schemes to avoid overlap
Examine ongoing schemes for potential merger or dropping due to overlapping objectives
Avoid unnecessary administrative expenses and establish a single monitoring body
CSSs and CSs should not create permanent posts

9dfc79e8408c101b68303f1f5ca7bb9d2e7712aa.rule_statement: Ministries affected as per Rule 4 of Transaction of Business Rules must comply
Select Ministries for consultations carefully to minimize delays

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Sponsoring Ministry must dispatch hard copy of notes to stakeholders on the same day as the forwarding memo date
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Proof of same-day delivery of hard copy

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Regular review of pending Cabinet notes in Senior Officers' Meetings is mandatory
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Records of review meetings and follow-ups

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Ministries must upload details of Cabinet/CCEA notes on the Samiksha portal, excluding sensitive content
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of uploaded details on the portal

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Both sponsoring and consulted Ministries must adhere to revised timelines for finalizing Cabinet notes
Instructions must be disseminated to all concerned for strict compliance
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of dissemination to all relevant parties

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Consulted Ministries must provide comments on Detailed Paper within 21 days
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Submission of comments within the timeline

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Sponsoring Ministry to prepare final EFC/PB memo within 14 days of receiving comments
Department of Expenditure to fix EFC/PIB meeting date within 7 days of receiving final memo
Sponsoring Ministry must circulate draft Cabinet note to D/o Expenditure within 7 days for approval
Consulted Ministries must provide comments on legislative proposals within 21 days
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Submission of comments within the timeline

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Consulted Ministries must provide comments on appraised proposals within 7 days
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Submission of comments within the timeline

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Other proposals must have comments submitted within 14 days
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Submission of comments within the timeline

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Sponsoring Ministry must finalize and circulate Cabinet note immediately after completion
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of circulation to Cabinet Secretariat

623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.rule_statement: Cabinet Secretariat must furnish comments to sponsoring Ministry within 7 days
623f421c6f550f1de233450e4e37859bb57ed97d.ministry_must_show: Submission of comments within the timeline

a9add5061c46e81622b0e36b8b7c93cd1eb43871.rule_statement: Ongoing schemes of scientific Ministries/Departments continue post Finance Commission cycle
New schemes/projects involving subsidies/grants to private sector require compliance

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Separate orders from Department of Economic Affairs apply for PPP project appraisal and approval
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Compliance with Department of Economic Affairs orders

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Cost increases up to 20% due to various reasons approved by Secretary with Financial Adviser's concurrence
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Secretary's approval and Financial Adviser's concurrence

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Increases beyond 20% must be reviewed by a Revised Cost Committee before further approval
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Submission to Revised Cost Committee for review

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Pre-investment activities up to Rs. 100 crore can be approved by Secretary with Financial Adviser's concurrence
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Financial resources availability and in-principle approval

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Pre-investment activities above Rs. 100 crore require full appraisal and approval procedure
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Follow prescribed appraisal and approval process

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: All Ministries must conduct outcome reviews and resubmit schemes at the end of the Twelfth Plan period
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Resubmission of schemes for appraisal and approval

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Ministries must prepare an output-outcome framework for each scheme with NITI Aayog's approval
e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.ministry_must_show: Output-outcome framework approved by NITI Aayog

e88927980226dd1773660368cce1b22299c2a15a.rule_statement: Continuation of schemes requires third-party evaluation results

a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.rule_statement: Submit Concept Paper/Feasibility Report to start scheme/project cycle
a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.ministry_must_show: Concept Paper or Feasibility Report submission

a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.rule_statement: DoE, NITI Aayog, and agencies to provide appraisal comments within 4 weeks
a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.ministry_must_show: Appraisal Note and Comments on DP/DPR

a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.rule_statement: Prepare and circulate final EFC/PIB Memo based on received comments within 2 weeks
a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.ministry_must_show: Final EFC/PIB Memo with comments incorporated

a9a89f8e2cd192cc8922339ea9bfa381f98db043.rule_statement: Complete appraisal and approval process within 1 week after final memo
Fix EFC/PIB meeting date within 1 week of final memo receipt
Issue EFC/PIB meeting minutes within 2 weeks after the meeting
Obtain on-file approval from Administrative and Finance Ministers within 2 weeks
Submit proposals above Rs. 1,000 crore for Cabinet approval within 2 weeks
If timelines are missed, trigger mechanism to escalate for timely decisions

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: EFC/SFC memorandum must include detailed scheme outline and relevant information
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: All specified details in the format

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: Outcomes and deliverables must be clearly defined with measurable indicators
Target beneficiaries must be identified with specific interventions for vulnerable groups
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: Details on beneficiary identification and interventions

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: Cost analysis must include detailed estimates and basis for costs
Scheme financing sources must be clearly indicated
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: Details on budgetary and external financing

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: Mandatory approvals and clearances must be listed and their status indicated
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: Table of approvals with availability status

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: Administrative structure and manpower requirements must be outlined
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: Details on manpower and outsourcing plans

f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.rule_statement: Monitoring and evaluation framework must be established
An Executive Summary must accompany the proposal
f8205049e2f339601b674c5b2f8937f79df003cd.ministry_must_show: Executive Summary with main elements of the scheme

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Complete project outline including title, agency, cost, timelines, and feasibility reports is required.
ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.ministry_must_show: All specified project details in the format

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Define project aims, year-wise outputs, and measurable indicators for impact assessment.
ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.ministry_must_show: Outcomes and deliverables in tabular form

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Provide detailed cost estimates, including land acquisition and price escalation considerations.
ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.ministry_must_show: Cost estimates and basis for calculations

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Indicate sources of finance, cost-sharing components, and funding tie-ups for loans.
ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.ministry_must_show: Sources and terms of project finance

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Calculate financial and economic internal rates of return for project viability.
List mandatory approvals and clearances required for the project.
ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.ministry_must_show: Table of approvals and their status

ead32d8fe30e40981ef8a7db15dbc30be2ab1dc7.rule_statement: Outline administrative structure and manpower requirements for project implementation.
Establish monitoring and evaluation framework, including timelines and impact assessment.
Attach an Executive Summary along with the Feasibility Report/Detailed Project Report.

55a859aa0af31fb8f304535f7f3ba24c6d232cc4.rule_statement: Output-outcome framework must be approved by CEO, NITI Aayog by 30 June 2016
Each scheme must have an evaluation framework; continuation depends on NITI Aayog's evaluation results
Identify outcome parameters as true indicators of desired outcomes; prioritize this task

9e9bf00b7445b3d4c7be7049668cf94cea9f3cd9.rule_statement: No CSS will be sanctioned if central share is less than 50%
9e9bf00b7445b3d4c7be7049668cf94cea9f3cd9.ministry_must_show: Justification for any CSS below 50% central share

9e9bf00b7445b3d4c7be7049668cf94cea9f3cd9.rule_statement: Core and Optional Schemes funded 100% by Centre in UTs without legislature; 80-20% in those with legislature
NITI Aayog to monitor and evaluate important CSS, focusing on outcomes over expenditure
Provisions to be reviewed after two years for course correction
